identificationModule.briefTitle: EMPA-REG OUTCOME: Empagliflozin Cardiovascular Outcome Event Trial in Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus Patients
identificationModule.officialTitle: A Phase III Randomised, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial to Evaluate Cardiovascular and Renal Microvascular Outcome Events with Empagliflozin (BI 10773) in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus at High Cardiovascular Risk

descriptionModule.briefSummary: This trial investigated the cardiovascular safety and efficacy of empagliflozin (SGLT2 inhibitor) versus placebo in patients with type 2 diabetes at high cardiovascular risk.

interventions.name: Empagliflozin
interventions.description: SGLT2 inhibitor, 10 mg or 25 mg once daily
